scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @bookmark-manager/extension && npm run lint -w @bookmark-manager/server
scripts.check: npm run check -w @bookmark-manager/extension && npm run check -w @bookmark-manager/server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @bookmark-manager/extension && npm run typecheck -w @bookmark-manager/server
scripts.test: npm run test -w @bookmark-manager/extension && npm run test -w @bookmark-manager/server
scripts.build: npm run build -w @bookmark-manager/extension && npm run build -w @bookmark-manager/server
